rulings.Case Title: GARY M. EVANS VS. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 12, 2017 line 3. DEFENDANTs THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON, MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC., RECONSTRUCT COMPANY, N.A., and BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1005 and CCP 1013. For a hearing date of July 12, 2017 the latest date for filing and serving by mail was June 14, 2017. Proof of service indicates filing and mail service on June 16, 2017. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARIAN B MOHR VS. EAST WEST BANK A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 12, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANT EAST WEST BANK A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION's MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION continued to August 4, 2017. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of the reply to department 501 no later than July 12, 2017 by 4:00 p.m. (Reply filed on July 7, 2017. No courtesy copy provided as of 12:30 p.m. on July 11, 2017). = (501/REQ)
